firmware.description:
## Version OTA 01.07.01.00:
### Improvements
1. Optimized the communication between printer and cloud service to provide faster notification push.
### Bugs fixed
1. Resolved the bug where the selection of a region after update would be greyed out.
2. Resolved the bug where the user cannot select the support filament(Support-W and Support-G) from the printer scren.
### Remaining issues
1. The custom automatic flow calibration files with custom names can not be saved when powered off.
